meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no coding experience (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no coding experience. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master User Onboarding Without Coding: Advanced Student Guide
content.seo_description: Bridge the 'no coding' gap. Learn to build professional user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code. A high-level guide for AI Builder students.
content.answer_block: Overcoming the no-code barrier requires leveraging LLM-driven development. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative implementation, you can build sophisticated, data-driven user onboarding flows. This approach transforms your lack of traditional syntax knowledge into a competitive advantage, allowing you to ship production-grade software rapidly.
content.intro:
The screen glows, a blinking cursor mocks your ambition. You have the vision for a world-class application, but the wall of 'no coding experience' stands between you and your first deployment. It is a familiar, suffocating tension—the feeling that your ideas are trapped behind a syntax barrier you aren't yet equipped to break.

But here is the secret: modern development is no longer about memorizing brackets; it is about orchestration. By utilizing AI-native development tools, you are moving beyond the role of a 'coder' and into the role of an 'architect.' You are about to bridge that gap, turning your conceptual vision into a functional, professional onboarding experience that hooks users from the first second.

steps.title: Architecting the Onboarding Flow
steps.description: Define the user journey. Map out the touchpoints from sign-up to 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a Senior Product Engineer. Design a 3-step user onboarding flow for a SaaS app. Include logic for welcome, feature tour, and profile setup. Output a JSON schema for the state machine.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate the onboarding state machine based on the Antigravity schema provided.'

steps.title: Scaffolding the UI Components
steps.description: Generate the frontend shell to hold your onboarding logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate React components for an onboarding carousel. Use Tailwind CSS for styling. Ensure responsive design and accessible navigation buttons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --path ./src/components/onboarding --prompt 'Implement the carousel components using the Antigravity design specs.'

steps.title: Implementing State Management
steps.description: Ensure the app remembers where the user is in the onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React Context provider for onboarding state. Manage current step, completion status, and user progress data.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file src/context/OnboardingContext.tsx --prompt 'Create the context provider logic for tracking user onboarding progress.'

steps.title: Integrating Data Persistence
steps.description: Save the user's progress to a backend so they can return later.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a Supabase integration for saving onboarding progress. Create a function to update the user_onboarding_status table.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Connect the OnboardingContext to Supabase using the provided schema.'

steps.title: Testing and Refinement
steps.description: Simulate user interactions to ensure the flow is frictionless.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write Playwright E2E tests for the onboarding flow. Test happy path, skip path, and session resumption.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Execute E2E tests and fix any UI regressions found in the onboarding flow.'

pro_tips: Prioritize the 'Aha!' moment: Never make the user click more than three times before they see the core value of your app.
Use skeleton loaders during onboarding: It masks latency and makes your app feel significantly faster than it actually is.
Implement 'Exit Intent' logic: If a user tries to close the onboarding, prompt them with a high-value incentive to stay.
Abstract your prompts: Save your most successful Antigravity prompts in a Notion library to maintain consistency across different app features.
Monitor drop-off rates: Use simple console logs or telemetry early on to see exactly which step causes users to abandon the flow.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, focus on building your 'Empty State' screens. These are the screens users see when they have no data yet—they are the next biggest opportunity to keep your users engaged and convert them into power users.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an architect of digital experiences. The barrier of 'no coding' has been dismantled by the tools in your hands. Now it is time to deploy your vision and watch users engage with what you have created. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
